ast.name: log
ast.source:
Plugin Loaded: Formatto
(Some error details are going to be displayed here.)
ast.target: 插件已加载：Formatto\n（此处将显示一些错误详情。）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` failed because your server does not serve Wasm with `application/wasm` MIME type. Falling back to `WebAssembly.instantiate` which is slower. Original error:
ast.target: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` 失败，因为您的服务器未提供 `application/wasm` MIME 类型的 Wasm。回退到较慢的 `WebAssembly.instantiate`。原始错误：\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source: using deprecated parameters for the initialization function; pass a single object instead
ast.target: 初始化函数使用了已弃用的参数；请改为传递单个对象
